name: loanDepot
description_short: loanDepot is a mortgage lender offering home purchase, refinance, and home equity loans through its Orlando branch and nationwide network.
description_long:
loanDepot operates as a residential mortgage lender with a physical branch presence, including a notable location in Orlando, Florida at 121 S. Orange Ave. The company is regulated as a mortgage servicer with NMLS number 1188814 and maintains a team of licensed loan officers and consultants to service clients. The Orlando branch operates standard business hours (9am-5pm) and provides direct access to branch management and loan professionals.

loanDepot offers multiple mortgage product categories: home purchase loans for buyers, refinancing options for existing homeowners, home equity products for accessing home value, and personal loans as an ancillary offering. The website includes mortgage calculators, educational content about the mortgage process, and resources like a home search tool powered by comehome. Their service model combines online application capability with in-person branch consultation through named loan officers and consultants.

The company distinguishes itself through a hybrid online-and-branch model, maintaining physical locations while offering digital tools for mortgage estimation and comparison. They provide educational content addressing common homeowner questions (e.g., "What Not To Do Once Your Home Is In Escrow") and maintain an active learning center. The Orlando branch specifically lists multiple NMLS-licensed professionals including a Branch Manager, Region Manager, and four Loan Consultants with individual credentials.

loanDepot is a legitimate, regulated mortgage lender suitable for borrowers seeking traditional home financing. The main limitations are that specific interest rates, loan terms, and product details are not provided on the website—only generic calculators and contact information. Borrowers must contact the branch or apply online to receive actual rate quotes, and the company's marketing heavily emphasizes phone and SMS contact authorization, which may indicate an aggressive sales approach.
address: 121 S Orlando Ave Ste 1500 Off# 1501, Orlando, FL 32801

company_info.headquarters: 121 S Orlando Ave Ste 1500 Off# 1501, Orlando, FL 32801

pros: NMLS-licensed and regulated mortgage lender with clearly identified licensed professionals (Branch Manager NMLS 437506, multiple Loan Consultants with NMLS numbers)
Multiple product offerings: home purchase, refinance, home equity, and personal loans
Physical branch location in Orlando with posted hours and named team members available for in-person consultation
Mortgage calculator tool enabling customers to estimate payments and total loan costs before applying
Educational resources and learning center with how-to articles on mortgage process and homeownership decisions
Home search tool integration (powered by comehome) to support the purchase process
Multiple contact methods: phone (407-985-7800), email (evazquez@loandepot.com), online application, and contact forms
cons: No specific interest rates, APRs, or loan terms published on the website; customers must contact or apply to receive quotes
Aggressive marketing approach emphasizing SMS/text messaging, automated dialing, and prerecorded voice contact authorization
Website content is limited to one branch location (Orlando); no information about nationwide availability or other branch locations despite domain suggesting broader reach
Generic mortgage calculator provides only illustrative estimates; disclaimer states actual rates and payments may be significantly higher or lower
Limited transparency on fees, closing costs, or product-specific requirements beyond generic educational articles
best_for: Florida homebuyers and homeowners seeking mortgage services in the Orlando area with preference for in-person branch consultation
Existing homeowners interested in refinancing or accessing home equity through a regulated lender with local presence
Borrowers comfortable with phone and digital contact methods who want to compare estimated mortgage payments using online tools
diagnosis: loanDepot is best suited for homebuyers and homeowners in Florida seeking traditional mortgage products with the option of in-person branch support combined with online tools. The main caveat is that all specific pricing, rates, and terms require direct contact or application submission—no rate transparency is provided upfront on the website, and the company's emphasis on aggressive multi-channel marketing (SMS, automated calls, AI voice) suggests a high-volume sales model.
services: Home equity loans and second mortgages
Mortgage payment estimation and comparison calculators
In-person branch consultation with licensed loan officers
Educational content and learning center resources
Loan officer and consultant availability by phone and email
SMS/text message communication about loan products and promotions
